description:
Doux encounters some monsters of terror and Doux, the demon king, and Jahi go on vacation.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: Kyoufu no Kaibutsu ga Miniku Sugiru!! / Reikai Rou wa Wakuwaku Sugiru!! / Maou no Sokkin wa Kangae Sugiru!!
The Monsters of Terror Look Too Ugly!! / The Spirit Tower Is Just Too Exciting!! / The Demon King`s Attendant Thinks Too Much!!
恐怖の怪物がみにくすぎる!! / 霊怪楼はワクワクすぎる!! / 魔王の側近は考えすぎる!!
